summary: Frontend-only UI modernization verified. Logged in as admin@accountantos.ch and traversed all 7 modernized pages (Documents, Payables, Receivables, Bank Reconciliation, VAT, Month-End Close, Audit Trail) in EN/DE/FR/IT. All pages rendered without any 'Uncaught runtime' / 'is not defined' crash. Toolbar filters and TableShell header (title + count) render correctly. Payables/Receivables specifically load without the previously reported 'Toolbar is not defined' error. All specified data-testids are present. Interactive controls (status selects, match toggle, checklist checkbox, Add Invoice modal) work.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar routes use short paths (/bank, /month-end, /audit) rather than the descriptive URLs mentioned in the review request (/bank-reconciliation, /month-end-close, /audit-trail). Not a bug, just a naming discrepancy vs the request text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route paths are /documents, /payables, /receivables, /bank, /vat, /month-end, /audit. Language switcher testid: language-switcher (button, opens menu with English/Deutsch/Français/Italiano). Counts observed: doc-status-select=24, match-btn=28, checklist-checkbox=28, audit-row=173. All modernized headers/toolbars render successfully across all languages.
verified_features: TableShell header bar (icon+title+count) renders on Documents, Payables, Receivables, Bank Reconciliation, Audit Trail
Toolbar card with filters renders on all 7 pages
Documents: company-filter, status-filter, add-document-btn, doc-status-select present and functional
Payables/Receivables: aging cards, company-filter, add-invoice-btn -> save-invoice-btn modal, export-aging-btn present
Bank: company-filter, import-csv-btn, export-recon-btn, match-btn present; match-btn click works
VAT: stat-output-vat, stat-input-vat, stat-vat-balance, export-vat-btn present
Month-End: company-filter, checklist-checkbox toggle works, export-checklist-btn present
Language switch to DE/FR/IT/EN triggers no runtime errors on any of the 7 pages
